languages.text: "Мои нервные синапсы достаточно экранированы, чтобы на их функционирование не влияли помехи, однако Нунциус... " {n}Манипулус тревожно хмурится.{/n} "...Не столь резистентен к деструктивным воздействиям извне".

"My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."
languages.original_text: "Мои нервные синапсы достаточно экранированы, чтобы на их функционирование не влияли помехи, однако Нунциус... " {n}Манипулус тревожно хмурится.{/n} "...Не столь резистентен к деструктивным воздействиям извне".

traits.locale_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

"My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

"My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

"My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

languages.text: «Mis sinapsis neuronales están tan protegidas que la interferencia no afecta a su funcionamiento, pero Nuncius...». {n}El manipulus frunce el ceño, intranquilo.{/n} «... Es mucho menos resistente contra las perturbaciones destructivas externas».
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

traits.locale_text: «Mis sinapsis neuronales están tan protegidas que la interferencia no afecta a su funcionamiento, pero Nuncius...». {n}El manipulus frunce el ceño, intranquilo.{/n} «... Es mucho menos resistente contra las perturbaciones destructivas externas».

languages.text: “我的神经突触有足够完善的防护，其功能不会受到干扰影响，但努恩修斯……”{n}操纵者忧虑地皱起眉头。{/n}“……对这种破坏性的外部干扰，他的抵抗力要弱得多。”
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

traits.locale_text: “我的神经突触有足够完善的防护，其功能不会受到干扰影响，但努恩修斯……”{n}操纵者忧虑地皱起眉头。{/n}“……对这种破坏性的外部干扰，他的抵抗力要弱得多。”

languages.text: "Meine neuralen Synapsen sind hinreichend abgeschirmt. Ihre Funktion würde durch die Interferenz also nicht beeinträchtigt, aber Nuncius ..." {n}Der Manipulus runzelt ängstlich die Stirn.{/n} "... ist weit weniger resilient gegen destruktive äußere Einflüsse."
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

traits.locale_text: "Meine neuralen Synapsen sind hinreichend abgeschirmt. Ihre Funktion würde durch die Interferenz also nicht beeinträchtigt, aber Nuncius ..." {n}Der Manipulus runzelt ängstlich die Stirn.{/n} "... ist weit weniger resilient gegen destruktive äußere Einflüsse."

languages.text: « Les protections de mes synapses neuronales sont suffisantes pour garantir que leur fonctionnement ne soit pas compromis par d'éventuelles interférences. Nuncius, en revanche... » {n}Le manipulus se renfrogne, visiblement nerveux.{/n} « ... Nuncius est bien moins résistant aux perturbations destructrices externes. »
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

traits.locale_text: « Les protections de mes synapses neuronales sont suffisantes pour garantir que leur fonctionnement ne soit pas compromis par d'éventuelles interférences. Nuncius, en revanche... » {n}Le manipulus se renfrogne, visiblement nerveux.{/n} « ... Nuncius est bien moins résistant aux perturbations destructrices externes. »

languages.text: "Sinirsel sinapslarım, işleyişlerinin müdahaleden etkilenmeyeceği kadar iyi korunuyor ama Nuncius..." {n}Manipülus, endişeyle kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Yıkıcı dış müdahalelere karşı daha dayanıksız."
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."

traits.locale_text: "Sinirsel sinapslarım, işleyişlerinin müdahaleden etkilenmeyeceği kadar iyi korunuyor ama Nuncius..." {n}Manipülus, endişeyle kaşlarını çatıyor.{/n} "Yıkıcı dış müdahalelere karşı daha dayanıksız."

languages.text: 「私の神経のシナプスは十分に遮蔽されており、妨害によって機能が影響を受けることはありませんが、ヌンシウスは...」{n}マニピュラスは不安そうに眉をひそめる.{/n} 「...破壊的な外部の乱れに対してははるかに脆弱です。」
languages.original_text: "My neural synapses are sufficiently shielded so that their functioning is not affected by interference, but Nuncius..." {n}The Manipulus frowns anxiously.{/n} "...is far less resilient against destructive external disruptions."
